title: pyrus × hippomenes
intro: Pyrus × hippomenes, also known as the hawthorn or haw, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The medicinal properties of Pyrus × hippomenes are attributed to its berries, leaves, and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including cardiovascular diseases, due to their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and vasodilatory effects. The health benefits of Pyrus × hippomenes include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular function, and reducing the risk of heart disease, as well as having antimicrobial and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, infusions, and capsules, with the berries being particularly used for their medicinal purposes.
